subcodes.first_line: O Land of Ṭá! By God, thou hast attained unto that wherewith most lands of the world have not been favoured. God hath made thee the Dawning-place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ارض طا تالله انک فزت بما لا فاز به اکثر بلاد العالم قد جعلک الله مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @consolation and comfort
